importedBy.importPath: "notes": "TestWorkspace and test/core import bizNumber directly; move impact is import path-only, but TestWorkspace policy should be explicitly acknowledged in move step.",
"summary": "Move only bizNumber.ts to src/common/utils/bizNumber.ts and update import paths.",
"reason": "bizNumber is pure normalize/validate/extract helper shared by app and test code. TestWorkspace/test-core impact is import path-only.",
"실제 move 단계는 bizNumber 단일 파일 이동과 import path 보정만 수행한다.",
| src/common/utils/bizNumber.ts | YES | shared pure util 위치, RunOCR/History/Test/autofill 공유 | TestWorkspace/test-core import path 보정 필요 | MEDIUM |
| src/components/test/utils/bizNumber.ts | NO | Test feature-local | app code가 test util을 import하게 됨 | HIGH |
- BZ-1 move에서 bizNumber 단일 파일 이동과 import path 보정만 수행한다.
- bizNumber: {test_impact_for('src/lib/bizNumber.ts', next(i for i in files if i['currentPath'] == 'src/lib/bizNumber.ts')['importedBy'])}
"src/lib/bizNumber.ts": ("common/utils", "src/common/utils/bizNumber.ts", "HIGH", "Shared pure util but TestWorkspace/test-core direct imports."),

- `profiles.ts`, `invoiceTableDisplay.ts`, `bizNumber.ts` 등 TestWorkspace import가 있는 common 후보도 실제 이동 시 TestWorkspace 미수정 검증 필요

role.mainResponsibility: Business registration number normalization/checksum validation and OCR text extraction helper.

pros: Pure business number normalize/extract helper fits common/utils.
Shared by RunOCR, History, autofillEngine and Test code.
cons: TestWorkspace and test/core need import path-only updates in actual move.
autofillEngine remains in src/lib and will temporarily import common/utils.
shared pure util remains in lib.
RunOCR/History/autofillEngine would import test feature util; invalid boundary.
RunOCR/History/Test also use it directly; duplication or bad dependency would result.
A safe pure util move is delayed.

recommendation.summary: Move only bizNumber.ts to src/common/utils/bizNumber.ts and update import paths.
recommendation.reason: bizNumber is pure normalize/validate/extract helper shared by app and test code. TestWorkspace/test-core impact is import path-only.
